channel.title: Health
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Health, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Savoring the Journey with Padma Lakshmi
item.description: The Emmy-nominated TV host dishes on the power of connection, food, fitness, and the art of finding joy.

item.title: Telehealth abortion is in the courts. Share your experience.
item.description: Mifepristone is facing another major legal challenge.

item.title: Why supporting a shelter for women is now 'kind of radioactive'
item.description: That's how researcher Beatriz Garcia Nice describes the new U.S. stance under the Trump administration to programs addressing gender-based violence.

item.title: Preventive Health Tests to Know After 50
A Practical Guide to Getting Fit in Midlife
Want A Better Immune System? Eat A Small Serving Of This Daily
item.description: It's also good for gut health.

item.title: Should Your Muscles Shake During A Workout? A Trainer Weighs In
item.description: Here's how to tell if it's healthy or harmful

item.title: This Zodiac Sign Is Most Likely To Be Power HungryâIs It Yours?
Large Meta-Analysis Says This Daily Habit Can Decrease Anxiety & Depression
item.description: It can decrease anxiety and depression.

item.title: This Spice Can Help Soothe Indigestion (No, Not Ginger)
item.description: But should you actually take it?

item.title: As more people turn to chatbots for health advice, studies say they may be led astray
item.description: People are turning to AI chatbots to help them with medical advice. Recent studies suggest these bots are not always helpful in making decisions about...

item.title: A new one-a-day-pill holds promise for HIV's 'forgotten population'
item.description: It's designed to take the place of complicated, multiple drug regimens that many people with HIV need to follow. And it's also beneficial because the ...

item.title: A homeless shelter and rehab center holds a marathon to get people back on their feet
item.description: Outside of Chicago, a homeless shelter and rehab center called Wayside Cross hosts a unique program to help people get back on their feet, one mile at...
